title: ComboBox Class
description: Represents a ComboBox that provides a menu of options.

parameters.name: element
parameters.description: The element for which to create ComboBox control.

properties.name: readonly element: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the root element of the control.

properties.name: readonly elementSelectedContent: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the container element that contains the selected option.

properties.name: readonly elementSearch: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the container element for search input.

properties.name: readonly focused: boolean
properties.description: Gets a value indicating whether the control have input focus.

properties.name: readonly groups: ComboBoxGroup[]
properties.description: Gets an array containing all groups.

properties.name: readonly options: ComboBoxOption[]
properties.description: Gets an array containing all option items.

properties.name: readonly selectedOptions: ComboBoxOption[]
properties.description: Gets an array of all currently selected options.

properties.name: readonly pickerVisible: boolean
properties.description: Gets a value indicating whether the dropdown picker is displayed.

properties.name: pickerLocations: number[]
properties.description: Gets or sets the preferred placement locations of the dropdown picker.

properties.name: pickerOption: ShowAtOption
properties.description: Gets or sets the placement option of the dropdown picker.
properties.remarks: The default value is <mark>{ distance: -1, distanceToContainer: 1 }</mark>.

properties.name: multiple: boolean
properties.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether multiple items can be selected.
remarks: When multiple changes from true to false while having more than one selected options, the lowest-index option will be preverst and all other options will be unselected.

properties.name: filterEnabled: boolean
properties.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the filtering features are visible. The default is false.

parameters.name: force?
parameters.description: Forces the dropdown picker to reposition, even if it is already visible.This is useful for reflecting changes when pickerLocations, pickerOption are updated.

methods.name: hidePicker(): void
methods.description: Hides the dropdown picker, resets filters and the outlined option.

parameters.name: force?
parameters.description: Forces the dropdown picker to reposition, even if it is already visible.This is useful for reflecting changes when pickerLocations, pickerOption are updated.

methods.name: add(modifiers: ComboBoxAddOption<T>): ComboBoxOption
methods.description: Adds a new ComboBoxOption, specified by modifiers, to the end of the list.

parameters.name: modifiers
parameters.description: The initialization properties for the newly created option.

methods.name: addGroup(group: ComboBoxGroup): void
methods.description: Adds a new ComboBoxGroup into the control.

methods.name: setFilters(text: string): void
methods.description: Sets the filter keyword for the list. The filter text is automatically reset when the picker is hidden.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The display name of the overlay progress UI.

returns.description: Returns the newly created overlay progress item.

methods.name: clearFilters(): void
methods.description: Resets filters to default and display all options.
methods.remarks: The method is automatically invoked when the picker is hidden.

events.name: comboboxchange
events.description: The change event is fired when the user modifies and commits the checked.
